channel.title: Azure-Openai on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Azure-Openai on Arrans github.io

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design LLMs/AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 3 / Gemini / Ollama / Bedrock / Azure / Mistral / Perplexity ), Multi-Modals (Vision/TTS) and plugin system. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT chat application.

item.title: laurentkempe/aspirePlayground
item.description: Some experiments around .NET Aspire to learn.
